properties.description: Many MFA pushes to same user in short window — suggests adversary attempting approval-fatigue.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResultType == 50158        // MFA Challenge required / failed
| summarize Attempts = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated),
            IPs       = make_set(IPAddress, 5)
            by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where Attempts > 3               // tune to baseline
| order by Attempts desc
